finalDetermination: The remaining V739 record-level miss is classified as volatile/equivalent when the changed field is raw-only serialization of the same authoritative record parts; lifecycle/status, type/category, report count, canonical location, coordinates, and active/cleared eligibility remain protected.

exactRecordLevelDiffFinding.beforeAfterValues: Inspect window.gridlyV739CommunityPulseSignatureDiffAudit?.().changedRecordValuesBeforeAfter on device; V740 keeps the before/after audit visible while parsing JSON signatures and legacy colon signatures.
exactRecordLevelDiffFinding.classification: volatile/equivalent if changedRecordFields contains only raw; authoritative if lifecycle, type, reportCount, lat, or lng changes

patchApplied: Stable record signatures now use canonical JSON parts so delimiters and null/undefined record-field formatting cannot create raw-only misses; V739 field-level audit visibility is preserved and remains backward-compatible with legacy colon signatures.
deniseValidation: Run two unchanged warm refreshes on the physical device.
Confirm window.gridlyV739CommunityPulseSignatureDiffAudit?.().changedRecordIds is empty unless lifecycle, type, reportCount, lat, or lng changed.
mergeRecommendation: Merge after Denise confirms unchanged warm refresh cache hit and no authoritative changedRecordFields.
